parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Zoom destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise zoom:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Zoom Chat webhook JSON body and post it to zoom.us/incoming/hook (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Zoom destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Zoom Chat incoming webhook (no Apprise)

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zoom token

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zoom webhook id
